name: library-loading
description: Verify StoryletLibrary.LoadFromDirectory() loads all .json files correctly
preconditions: Directory models/tale/ with 6+ role-specific JSON files containing 40+ storylets total
expectedOutcome: All JSON files loaded, 40+ storylets indexed, no duplicates, all accessible

steps.comment: NPC created, library should be loaded during initialization
NPC ready with access to storylet library
Verify library is accessible and populated
